description: A single payment channel where contributions can be made. Each channel is an individual record keyed by its slug ID. Maps to a funding.json channel entry.

main.description: A payment channel — a specific place where contributions can be received (e.g. a GitHub Sponsors page, an Open Collective profile, a bank account). Each channel is an independent record, individually addressable by its AT URI.

channelType.description: Channel category. Maps to funding.json channel.type.

uri.description: The payment URL for this channel (e.g. https://github.com/sponsors/you). Optional for channels without a public URL (e.g. bank transfers). Maps to funding.json channel.address.

createdAt.description: When this record was created or last updated.
